name: claude-code-plugins
description: Bundled plugins for Claude Code including Agent SDK development tools, PR review toolkit, and commit workflows

plugins.name: agent-sdk-dev
plugins.description: Development kit for working with the Claude Agent SDK

plugins.name: claude-opus-4-5-migration
plugins.description: Migrate your code and prompts from Sonnet 4.x and Opus 4.1 to Opus 4.5.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review for pull requests using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Commands for git commit workflows including commit, push, and PR creation

plugins.name: explanatory-output-style
plugins.description: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with specialized agents

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Easily create custom hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors

plugins.name: learning-output-style
plugins.description: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive toolkit for developing Claude Code plugins

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: Comprehensive PR review agents specializing in comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality

plugins.name: ralph-wiggum
plugins.description: Interactive self-referential AI loops for iterative development

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: Security reminder hook that warns about potential security issues when editing files
